message:
refactor: use StaticStringMap dispatch, remove intermediate buffer, consolidate tests

Replace if/else-if chain in interpolateTmuxFormat with StaticStringMap +
switch for O(1) variable lookup. Remove unnecessary intermediate line
buffer in handleTmuxListPanes (write directly to output buf). Use orelse
in handleTmuxDisplayMessage. Consolidate 12 individual interpolation
tests into 2 table-driven tests. Net -46 lines.
